blended.narrative: Welch Village is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: rain, highs of 43°F, winds around 21 mph.
Sunday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 1.7" of snow, highs of 22°F, winds around 21 mph.
